title: WHCA announces mentalist Oz Pearlman for correspondents’ dinner entertainer
author: Dominick Mastrangelo
fullText: Mentalist Oz Pearlman will serve as the entertainer for this year’s White House Correspondents’ Association dinner, the WHCA announced on Thursday. Pearlman, an Emmy Award winner and New York Times bestselling author, has made a name for himself in recent years with performances including magic tricks and mind reading for sports teams, A-list celebrities and…
